name: Fried Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 4 scoops (about 1/2 cup each) of ice cream in a small pan.
2. Freeze the mixture for 1 hour or until firm.
3. In a small mixing bowl, stir together 1 beaten egg and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract.
4. In a pie plate, carefully stir together the crushed cornflakes and 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon.
5. Dip each frozen ice cream ball into the egg mixture, then roll it in the cereal mixture.
6. Freeze the coated ice cream balls for another 1 hour or until firm.
7. Reserve any remaining cereal mixture.
8. In a small mixing bowl, stir together 1 beaten egg and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract.
9. Remove the coated ice cream balls from the freezer.
10. Dip each ball into the egg mixture, then roll them in the remaining cereal mixture.
11. Return the coated ice cream balls to the pan. Cover and freeze for several hours or until firm.
12. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy saucepan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
13. Fry the frozen, coated ice cream balls, 1 or 2 at a time, in hot oil for 15 seconds or until golden brown.
14. Drain on paper towels and return the fried ice cream balls to the freezer while frying the remaining balls.
15. Serve immediately and garnish with mint sprigs, if desired.
Makes 4 servings
